# Personal Landing Page

## Description
This project is a personal landing page designed to help recruiters quickly understand my skills, experience, and the business value I bring as a Business Analytics and Finance student at the University of Iowa. It goes beyond a traditional resume by presenting projects and experience in a clear, business-focused way. The site emphasizes how I use data to solve real problems, communicate insights, and support decision-making. The goal is to create stronger first impressions and drive recruiting conversations for analytics and finance roles.

---

## Features
- Clean, single-page layout optimized for recruiter screening
- Clear presentation of core strengths: data visualization, business communication, and problem solving
- Featured experience from The Toro Company and Strategic Education Inc.
- Project explanations focused on business impact, not just technical tools
- Mobile-first responsive design with simple navigation
- Direct contact links for LinkedIn, GitHub, and email

---

## Tech Stack

| Technology | Purpose |
|----------|--------|
| HTML5 | Semantic structure and content layout |
| CSS3 | Styling and responsive design |
| GitHub | Version control and repository hosting |

---

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites
- A modern web browser (Chrome, Safari, or Firefox)
- Git installed on your machine  
  https://git-scm.com/downloads

---

### Installation

1. Clone the repository:
```bash
git clone https://github.com/bensheehan11/personal-landing.git
```

2. Navigate into the project folder:
```bash
cd personal-landing
```

3. Open the project:
- Double click `index.html`, or  
- Open with Live Server in VS Code  

---

## Usage
This site is intended to be shared with recruiters and hiring managers. Once opened, users can:
- Quickly understand my background and career focus  
- Review key skills and tools  
- Explore featured projects and real-world experience  
- Connect directly through LinkedIn or email  

---

## Project Structure

```
personal-landing/
├── index.html
├── css/
│   └── stylesheet.css
├── js/
│   └── scripts.js
├── images/
│   └── headshot.jpg
```

---

## Changelog

### v1.0.0 — Initial Release
- Built full one-page landing page  
- Added hero, bio, skills, and project sections  
- Implemented responsive layout  
- Included contact section with LinkedIn CTA  

---

## Known Issues / To-Do

- [ ] Add quantified results to project descriptions  
- [ ] Deploy site (Azure or GitHub Pages)  
- [ ] Improve SEO and meta tags  
- [ ] Add small interactive elements (optional JavaScript)  

---

## Roadmap

- Expand project section with additional case studies  
- Improve visual storytelling (charts, visuals, or dashboards)  
- Enhance UI with subtle animations and hover effects  
- Tailor content for specific industries or roles  

---

## Contributing

Contributions are welcome:

1. Fork the repository  
2. Create a new branch:
```bash
git checkout -b feature-name
```
3. Make your changes  
4. Commit and push:
```bash
git commit -m "Added new feature"
git push origin feature-name
```
5. Open a pull request
